# Omnidrop

> Free, secure file transfers for everybody. Send files up to 4 GB per link. Links expire in 1, 3, or 7 days. Operated by HUMMIFY LTD (UK).

## What Omnidrop does

Omnidrop is a web-based file transfer service. A signed-in sender uploads files and shares them with a recipient either via a shareable link or a direct email notification. Files are stored encrypted in transit and at rest and are deleted automatically after the sender-chosen expiry.

## Key facts

- Transfer limit: 4 GB per transfer
- Monthly cap: 20 transfers per calendar month per signed-in user
- Expiry options: 1, 3, or 7 days
- Sign-in: one-time passcode sent to the sender's email; no password
- Recipient: does not need an account to download
- Price: free
- Privacy posture: no analytics, no tracking, no advertising cookies

## Routes

- `/` — landing page and upload surface
- `/privacy` — privacy policy
- `/terms` — terms of service

## Operator

HUMMIFY LTD
Contact: contact@hummify.app
